case_title: FOMAI ROSALIE ANNE VS MAZER DANIELLE LOUISE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAZER DANIELLE LOUISE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $339.96 FILED BY FOMAI ROSALIE ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT MAZER DANIELLE LOUISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
